subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast arranged the scattered pearls of this luminous poem, which, like radiant verses and gleaming pearls, hath issued forth from the shell of genius [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم لولو منثور منظومه غراء که مانند قرائد نوراء و لئالی لئلا از صدف قریحه
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement
